case_title: PHILLIPS, JANINE VS HONG, LOUIE K. et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY PHILLIPS, JANINE AS TO DEFENDANT HONG, LOUIE K. HONG, KIM F. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-22-1996 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PHILLIPS, JANINE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT HONG, LOUIE K. HONG, KIM F. PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE IS DENIED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PHILLIPS, JANINE HEARING SET FOR AUG-22-1996 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT C
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF AUG-22-1996, GRANTED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT HONG, LOUIE K. HONG, KIM F. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
